alerts.reason: Previously seen signal for Blanton's Original Single Barrel in MD-MONTGOMERY is absent from current run.
alerts.evidence: Montgomery ABS ASP.NET product search row: BLANTON'S BOURBON (HAL) - 750ML (#69442) at $89.99; marked allocated. Store-level modal is not exposed for these allocated rows in the product-card HTML.
